text:
Before: 45 minutes a day. Bleary-eyed drafting. Forgetting to post. Watching the algorithm punish inconsistency.

After: One Saturday afternoon. 2 hours of setup. Free tools. Official Meta API. Now it posts, reads its own analytics, and writes better tomorrow. Tokens refresh themselves. I haven't logged in since.

Consistency without the daily grind. That's the whole upgrade.

Comment 'AUTO' and I'll send you the details
